 231 |     ) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
 232 |         if not current_user or not messages:
 233 |             return messages
 234 |         if messages[-1] == current_user:
 235 |             return messages[:-1]
 236 |         return [msg for msg in messages if msg is not current_user]
 237 | 
 238 |     @classmethod
 239 |     def _truncate_text(cls, text: str, token_budget: int) -> str:
 240 |         if not text or token_budget <= 0:
 241 |             return ""
 242 |         char_budget = token_budget * 4
 243 |         value = str(text)
 244 |         if len(value) <= char_budget:
 245 |             return value
 246 |         marker = "\n...[truncated by ContextAssembler budget]"
 247 |         return value[: max(0, char_budget - len(marker))].rstrip() + marker
 248 | 
 249 |     @staticmethod
 250 |     def _estimate_text_tokens(text: Any) -> int:
 251 |         return max(0, len(str(text or "")) // 4)
 252 | 
 253 |     @classmethod
 254 |     def _estimate_messages_tokens(cls, messages: Iterable[Dict[str, Any]]) -> int:
 255 |         return sum(max(1, len(str(msg)) // 4) for msg in messages)
--- 读取完毕 ---
